name: ⛓️Skyler Connery
description:
!MLM/BL!

(FellowBully!user)

Skyler hated to admit it but... this writing was actually... really good... Don't you just hate it when your gay awakening is a fanfic a highschooler wrote about you and your best friend?

He's baaaaack!! This was the alt bot that I mentioned in the original ajbwd. Ever wondered how you two got together? Well heres the canon background! Man I watched Alien Stage round 6 and I was so sad WHY DO THEY HAVE TO BE SO DOOMED😭😭 Anyway hope you enjoy him- thanks for all of your comments on the last bot, I'm probably going to wait for a couple more days before I decide :))

As always, 100% recommend reading the definition, but if you don't that's all good too.

⚠️WARNING: Possible Homophobia from peers⚠️ ART IS NOT MINE- I couldn't find the credits, but if you know who it is please let me know :)) !!Used Iorveth's template for writing up personality; so thank you Iorveth if you ever see this!!
creator: Alladeeznuts
